reviews.comment:
Los baños un lujo el lugar muy limpio una buena atención y un gran verde a su alrededor

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are luxurious, the place is very clean, the service is good, and there's a lot of greenery surrounding it.

reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar para descansar y cargar combustible ..el personal de la ypf muy amable y con muchas ganas de ayudar a turistas

(Translated by Google)
A great place to rest and refuel. The YPF staff are very friendly and eager to help tourists.

reviews.comment:
Una verguenza dejan entrar a todo el mundo el recreo tiene que ser SOLO SOCIOS van personas muy sucias.no respetan nada..soy socio del año 1982 y realmente estoy pensando en borrarme si cualquiera puede entrar al recreo..una pena pero como decayó el ACA  ponganse lss pilas sino se ban a quedar sin socios el recreo y los baños UN ASCO.

(Translated by Google)
It's a disgrace, they let everyone in. The break should be for MEMBERS ONLY. There are very dirty people there. They don't respect anything. I've been a member since 1982 and I'm really thinking about cancelling my membership if anyone can come in. It's a shame, but since the ACA has declined, get your act together, otherwise you'll be left without members. The break and the bathrooms are DISGUSTING.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzbjh2YmNREAE

reviews.comment:
Parada obligada cuando vuelvo de Mar del plata. Aunque ya no hacen más los clásicos sandwiches de jamón crudo como antes; es un lindo lugar para parar a tomar aire. Tiene juegos para niños.

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop on my way back from Mar del Plata. Although they don't make the classic prosciutto sandwiches like they used to, it's a nice place to stop and get some fresh air. They have a children's play area.
